title: Linear Algebra (2LA)

prerequisites.text: MAM1031F and MAM1032S or equivalent. With convener permission, students with 70% for both MAM1010F and MAM1012S may register.

outline: Students study the fundamentals of linear algebra, including: vector spaces, linear independence, spans, bases, row space, column space, null space; linear maps; eigenvectors and eigenvalues; inner product spaces; and orthogonality.
lecture_times: Mondays, Thursdays and some Wednesdays in 5th period. Note: Lectures alternate during the week so students can take MAM2010F and MAM2011F concurrently.
